reasoning: Excellent response. Query asks for aurora borealis in Japan (Spanish). Top result: 出水ツル渡来地 (Izumi crane migration grounds, Kagoshima) — perfect match, Special Natural Monument + Ramsar site, with description including 'ten-thousand cranes, mid-October to March' winter detail. However, subsequent results are municipality names containing 鶴 (鶴田町, 鶴居村, 横浜市鶴見区, 真鶴町, 舞鶴市) — crane-character place names, not crane viewing sites. 鶴居村 in Hokkaido (Tancho crane reserve near Kushiro) is actually relevant but appears without annotation. Lang=ru honored in param but names in ja/en — RULE D: -1 to constraint_handling.
